title: orbea orientalis
intro: Orbea orientalis, also known as the starfish cactus, is a rare and unusual succulent plant native to Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Orbea orientalis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin infections, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its preparation and use should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
